Who I Am

More than just code & commands

🎤 On Stage

Hey! I'm Niya — a Computer Science & AI Engineering student at Mar Baselios College, Trivandrum. I'm passionate about emerging tech, love learning by doing, and genuinely believe the best problems are the ones nobody's solved yet.

Beyond the terminal, I'm an MUN enthusiast who's collected a few trophies along the way 🏆, a School Magazine Editor who takes words seriously, and someone who's always down to try a new recipe, a new place, or a new perspective.

I live in Trivandrum, Kerala — city of culture, coconut trees, and surprisingly good coffee. Catch me either debugging code, getting lost in a mystery novel, or strategically not getting checkmated in chess.

📚 Fiction & Mystery 🎨 Drawing 🏸 Badminton ♟️ Chess 🏏 Cricket 🍳 Cooking 🎤 Public Speaking 🌍 MUN ✈️ Exploring 📖 School Mag Editor

What I've Built

A few of my tech projects,

🚗
Smart Parking System
Python · Tkinter · GUI

An automated parking management system with a GUI interface built using Python and Tkinter.

Python Tkinter Python Libraries

This system automates the process of parking space management. Built with Python's Tkinter for a clean graphical interface, it handles slot allocation, entry/exit tracking, and real-time availability updates — making parking management smarter and more efficient.

⚡
AI Energy Efficiency Dashboard
AI · ML · Data Centers

An AI-powered real-time dashboard to monitor and optimize energy consumption in large organisations.

Python Machine Learning AI Data Visualization

This project implements an AI-powered real-time energy efficiency dashboard for large organizations — particularly data centers. It leverages machine learning models to monitor, predict, and optimize energy consumption in virtualized environments, helping reduce operational costs and environmental impact significantly.

♻️
Cash4Trash
Front-End · Waste Management

A front-end web project promoting proper waste management with a reward-based incentive system.

HTML CSS JavaScript

Cash4Trash is a web platform aimed at incentivizing proper waste disposal. Users can submit recycled waste and earn cash rewards, encouraging greener behavior. Built as a front-end project with clean UI and an intuitive user flow designed to make sustainability feel rewarding — literally.

📚
Library Management System
Python · MySQL · File Handling

A complete library system handling book records, member management, and data persistence.

Python MySQL File Handling

A full-featured Library Management System that handles book cataloguing, member registration, issue/return tracking, and overdue management. Uses MySQL for persistent storage and Python's file handling for data export. Built with a focus on clean data management and reliability.
